core.title: Digital Asset Portfolio
core.description: Portfolio strategy, acquisition decisions, valuation logic, and the federation network. How 80+ properties get managed, monetized, and connected.

content.about: This channel goes behind the portfolio spreadsheet. What to buy, what to build, what to sell, and how properties get networked together into a compounding system.
content.what_to_expect: Portfolio review sessions, acquisition analysis, monetization experiments, and federation strategy documented as decisions get made.

seo.meta_title: Digital Asset Portfolio | AI Now Guide
seo.meta_description: Portfolio strategy, acquisition decisions, and federation network management for an 80+ property AI-first digital asset portfolio.
